notes: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 Forbidden via both WebFetch and curl (21-byte body). Consistent with prior days — monitoring environment is blocked by CDN/WAF bot protection (Cloudflare/Vercel). Simultaneous failure across all sites makes true outage unlikely; treat as check_inconclusive for availability and verify manually if concerned. SSL alert is genuine: all certs expire 2026-05-21 (29 days), below the 30-day warning threshold. NOTE: cert expiry shifted from 2026-05-19 (reported 2026-04-19) to 2026-05-21, suggesting Vercel auto-renewed the certs between April 19–21. Monitor next run to confirm renewal completed.
